pages.text:
Confidenticl

Paris, June 26, 1947

Excellency:

In your letter of even date and following our recent conversations, Your Excellency was so good as to convey to me the desire of the

French Government to foster commercial and cul- tural relations

ketween the Philippines and

France and more

specifically to promote good

neighbor intercourse between the Republic of the Philippines and Indochina.

I have the honor to confirm to Your Ex- cellency my personal view that due to the pro- ximity of Indochina and the Philippines the initial

study at an early date of your sugges-

tion is acceptable to my Government.

Accept, Excellency, the assurances of my highest consideration.

ELPIDIO QUIRINO

Vice-President and concurrently

Secretary of Foreign Affairs

His Excellency

Monsieur Georges Fidault

Minister

for Foreign Affairs

Paris,

France
